/usr/bin/sed -e s/NN/32/g < /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/elfxx-target.h > elf32-target.h

make[2]: Entering directory '/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/build/bfd'
\
bfd_version=`echo "2.46.0" | /usr/bin/sed -e 's/\([^\.]*\)\.*\([^\.]*\)\.*\([^\.]*\)\.*\([^\.]*\)\.*\([^\.]*\).*/\1.00\2.00\3.00\4.00\5/' -e 's/\([^\.]*\)\..*\(..\)\..*\(..\)\..*\(..\)\..*\(..\)$/\1\2\3\4\5/'` ;\
bfd_version_string="\"2.46.0\"" ;\
bfd_soversion="2.46.0" ;\
bfd_version_package="\"(Gentoo 2.46.0 p1) \"" ;\
report_bugs_to="\"<https://bugs.gentoo.org/>\"" ;\
. /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/development.sh ;\
if test "$development" = true ; then \
  bfd_version_date=`/usr/bin/sed -n -e 's/.*DATE //p' < /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/version.h` ;\
  bfd_version_string="\"2.46.0.${bfd_version_date}\"" ;\
  bfd_soversion="2.46.0.${bfd_version_date}" ;\
fi ;\
if test x"gentoo-sys-devel-binutils-st" != x ; then \
  bfd_soversion="${bfd_soversion}.gentoo-sys-devel-binutils-st" ;\
fi ;\
/usr/bin/sed -e "s,@bfd_version@,$bfd_version," \
    -e "s,@bfd_version_string@,$bfd_version_string," \
    -e "s,@bfd_version_package@,$bfd_version_package," \
    -e "s,@report_bugs_to@,$report_bugs_to," \
    < /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/version.h > bfdver.h; \
echo "${bfd_soversion}" > libtool-soversion
make[2]: Leaving directory '/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/build/bfd'

    posrcprefix='/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/'; \

    posrcprefix="../"; \
  fi; \
  rm -f SRC-POTFILES-t SRC-POTFILES \
    && (sed -e '/^#/d' \
            -e '/^[ 	]*$/d' \

	| sed -e '$s/\\$//') > SRC-POTFILES-t \
    && chmod a-w SRC-POTFILES-t \
    && mv SRC-POTFILES-t SRC-POTFILES )

\
/usr/bin/mkdir -p doc; \
echo "@set VERSION 2.46.0" > doc/bfdver.texi; \
if test -n "(Gentoo 2.46.0 p1) "; then \
  echo "@set VERSION_PACKAGE (Gentoo 2.46.0 p1) " >> doc/bfdver.texi; \
fi; \
echo "@set UPDATED `date '+%B %Y'`" >> doc/bfdver.texi; \
if test -n "@uref{https://bugs.gentoo.org/}"; then \
  echo "@set BUGURL @uref{https://bugs.gentoo.org/}" >> doc/bfdver.texi; \
fi

restore=: && backupdir=".am$$" && \
rm -rf $backupdir && mkdir $backupdir && \
if (true true true --version) >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
  for f in doc/bfd.info doc/bfd.info-[0-9] doc/bfd.info-[0-9][0-9] doc/bfd.i[0-9] doc/bfd.i[0-9][0-9]; do \
    if test -f $f; then mv $f $backupdir; restore=mv; else :; fi; \
  done; \
else :; fi && \
if true true true --no-split -I "/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/doc" -P doc  -I doc -I /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/doc \
 -o doc/bfd.info `test -f 'doc/bfd.texi' || echo '/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/'`doc/bfd.texi; \
then \
  rc=0; \
else \
  rc=$?; \
  $restore $backupdir/* `echo "./doc/bfd.info" | sed 's|[^/]*$||'`; \
fi; \
rm -rf $backupdir; exit $rc

f=""; \
for i in elf64-x86-64.lo elfxx-x86.lo elf-ifunc.lo elf-vxworks.lo elf64.lo elf.lo elflink.lo elf-attrs.lo elf-strtab.lo elf-eh-frame.lo elf-properties.lo elf-sframe.lo dwarf1.lo dwarf2.lo elf32-i386.lo elf32.lo pei-i386.lo peigen.lo cofflink.lo coffgen.lo pe-x86_64.lo pex64igen.lo pei-x86_64.lo elf64-gen.lo elf32-gen.lo plugin.lo cpu-i386.lo cpu-iamcu.lo  archive64.lo ; do \
  case " $f " in \
    *" $i "*) ;; \
    *) f="$f $i" ;; \
  esac ; \
done ; \
echo $f > tofiles

libtooldir=`/bin/sh ./libtool --config | sed -n -e 's/^objdir=//p'`; \
if [ -f $libtooldir/libopcodes.a ]; then \
  cp $libtooldir/libopcodes.a libopcodes.tmp; \
  x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-ranlib --plugin /usr/libexec/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/15/liblto_plugin.so libopcodes.tmp; \
  /bin/sh /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/opcodes/../move-if-change libopcodes.tmp libopcodes.a; \
else true; fi

(echo "/* This file is automatically generated.  DO NOT EDIT! */";\
for f in `echo " " eelf_x86_64.o eelf_i386.o eelf32_x86_64.o eelf_iamcu.o "" \
 | sed -e 's/ e/ ld/g' -e 's/ ld/ /g' -e 's/[.]o//g'`; do \
    echo "extern ld_emulation_xfer_type ld_${f}_emulation;"; \
done;\
echo "";\
echo "#define EMULATION_LIST \\";\
for f in `echo " " eelf_x86_64.o eelf_i386.o eelf32_x86_64.o eelf_iamcu.o "" \
 | sed -e 's/ e/ ld/g' -e 's/ ld/ /g' -e 's/[.]o//g'`; do \
    echo "  &ld_${f}_emulation, \\"; \
done;\
echo "  0") >ldemul-tmp.h

mv ldemul-tmp.h ldemul-list.h

    posrcprefix='/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/ld/'; \

    && (sed -e '/^#/d' -e '/^[	 ]*$/d' \

make[5]: Leaving directory '/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/build/ld'

srcroot=`cd /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/ld && pwd`; export srcroot; \
r=`pwd`; export r; \
LC_ALL=C; export LC_ALL; \
EXPECT=expect; export EXPECT; \
runtest=runtest; \
if /bin/sh -c "$runtest --version" > /dev/null 2>&1; then \
  $runtest --tool ld --srcdir ${srcroot}/testsuite \
	CC="x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-gcc" CFLAGS="-O3 -march=native -mtune=native -pipe -ffat-lto-objects    " \
	CXX="x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-g++" CXXFLAGS="-O3 -march=native -mtune=native -pipe -ffat-lto-objects    " \
	CC_FOR_TARGET="x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-gcc" \
	CFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-O3 -march=native -mtune=native -pipe -ffat-lto-objects" \
	CXX_FOR_TARGET="x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-g++" \
	CXXFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-O3 -march=native -mtune=native -pipe -ffat-lto-objects" \
	OFILES="ldgram.o ldlex-wrapper.o lexsup.o ldlang.o mri.o ldctor.o ldmain.o plugin.o ldwrite.o ldexp.o  ldemul.o ldver.o ldmisc.o ldfile.o ldcref.o eelf_x86_64.o eelf_i386.o eelf32_x86_64.o eelf_iamcu.o ldelf.o ldelfgen.o ldbuildid.o" BFDLIB="-Wl,--rpath,../bfd/.libs ../bfd/.libs/libbfd.so" CTFLIB="-Wl,--rpath,../libctf/.libs ../libctf/.libs/libctf.so -lz" \
	SFRAMELIB="-Wl,--rpath,../libsframe/.libs ../libsframe/.libs/libsframe.so" \
	JANSSON_LIBS="" ZSTD_LIBS="-lzstd" \
	LIBIBERTY="../libiberty/libiberty.a " LIBS="" \
	DO_COMPARE="`echo 'cmp --ignore-initial=16 $f1 $f2' | sed -e 's,\\$,,g'`" \
	; \
else echo "WARNING: could not find \`runtest'" 1>&2; :;\
fi

make[3]: Entering directory '/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/build/bfd'
restore=: && backupdir=".am$$" && \
rm -rf $backupdir && mkdir $backupdir && \
if (true true true --version) >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
  for f in doc/bfd.info doc/bfd.info-[0-9] doc/bfd.info-[0-9][0-9] doc/bfd.i[0-9] doc/bfd.i[0-9][0-9]; do \
    if test -f $f; then mv $f $backupdir; restore=mv; else :; fi; \
  done; \
else :; fi && \
if true true true --no-split -I "/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/doc" -P doc  -I doc -I /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/doc \
 -o doc/bfd.info `test -f 'doc/bfd.texi' || echo '/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/'`doc/bfd.texi; \
then \
  rc=0; \
else \
  rc=$?; \
  $restore $backupdir/* `echo "./doc/bfd.info" | sed 's|[^/]*$||'`; \
fi; \
rm -rf $backupdir; exit $rc

f=""; \
for i in elf64-x86-64.lo elfxx-x86.lo elf-ifunc.lo elf-vxworks.lo elf64.lo elf.lo elflink.lo elf-attrs.lo elf-strtab.lo elf-eh-frame.lo elf-properties.lo elf-sframe.lo dwarf1.lo dwarf2.lo elf32-i386.lo elf32.lo pei-i386.lo peigen.lo cofflink.lo coffgen.lo pe-x86_64.lo pex64igen.lo pei-x86_64.lo elf64-gen.lo elf32-gen.lo plugin.lo cpu-i386.lo cpu-iamcu.lo  archive64.lo ; do \
  case " $f " in \
    *" $i "*) ;; \
    *) f="$f $i" ;; \
  esac ; \
done ; \
echo $f > tofiles

libtool: link: ( cd ".libs" && rm -f "libopcodes.la" && ln -s "../libopcodes.la" "libopcodes.la" )
make[4]: Entering directory '/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/build/opcodes'
libtooldir=`/bin/sh ./libtool --config | sed -n -e 's/^objdir=//p'`; \
if [ -f $libtooldir/libopcodes.a ]; then \
  cp $libtooldir/libopcodes.a libopcodes.tmp; \
  x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-ranlib --plugin /usr/libexec/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/15/liblto_plugin.so libopcodes.tmp; \
  /bin/sh /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/opcodes/../move-if-change libopcodes.tmp libopcodes.a; \
else true; fi

touch stamp-lib

(echo "/* This file is automatically generated.  DO NOT EDIT! */";\
for f in `echo " " eelf_x86_64.o eelf_i386.o eelf32_x86_64.o eelf_iamcu.o "" \
 | sed -e 's/ e/ ld/g' -e 's/ ld/ /g' -e 's/[.]o//g'`; do \
    echo "extern ld_emulation_xfer_type ld_${f}_emulation;"; \
done;\
echo "";\
echo "#define EMULATION_LIST \\";\
for f in `echo " " eelf_x86_64.o eelf_i386.o eelf32_x86_64.o eelf_iamcu.o "" \
 | sed -e 's/ e/ ld/g' -e 's/ ld/ /g' -e 's/[.]o//g'`; do \
    echo "  &ld_${f}_emulation, \\"; \
done;\
echo "  0") >ldemul-tmp.h

restore=: && backupdir=".am$$" && \
rm -rf $backupdir && mkdir $backupdir && \
if (true true true --version) >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
  for f in doc/bfd.info doc/bfd.info-[0-9] doc/bfd.info-[0-9][0-9] doc/bfd.i[0-9] doc/bfd.i[0-9][0-9]; do \
    if test -f $f; then mv $f $backupdir; restore=mv; else :; fi; \
  done; \
else :; fi && \
if true true true --no-split -I "/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/doc" -P doc  -I doc -I /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/doc \
 -o doc/bfd.info `test -f 'doc/bfd.texi' || echo '/var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/work/binutils-2.46.0/bfd/'`doc/bfd.texi; \
then \
  rc=0; \
else \
  rc=$?; \
  $restore $backupdir/* `echo "./doc/bfd.info" | sed 's|[^/]*$||'`; \
fi; \
rm -rf $backupdir; exit $rc

for i in nm-new strip-new ar ranlib dlltool windres objdump objcopy readelf; do \
  if [ -f $i ]; then \
    j=`echo $i | sed -e 's/-new//'`; \
    k=`echo $j | sed 's,y,y,'`; \
    if [ "/usr/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/binutils-bin/2.46.0/$k" != "/usr/lib64/binutils/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/2.46.0/bin/$j" ]; then \
      rm -f /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/image/usr/lib64/binutils/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/2.46.0/bin/$j; \
      ln /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/image/usr/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/binutils-bin/2.46.0/$k /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/image/usr/lib64/binutils/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/2.46.0/bin/$j >/dev/null 2>/dev/null \
	||  /bin/sh ./libtool --mode=install /var/tmp/portage/._portage_reinstall_.5vp42738/bin/ebuild-helpers/xattr/install -c $i /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/image/usr/lib64/binutils/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/2.46.0/bin/$j; \
    fi; \
  else true; \
  fi; \
done

for f in ldscripts/* ; do \
  case $f in \
    stamp) ;; \
    *) /var/tmp/portage/._portage_reinstall_.5vp42738/bin/ebuild-helpers/xattr/install -c -m 644 $f /var/tmp/portage/sys-devel/binutils-2.46.0/image/usr/lib64/binutils/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/2.46.0/lib/$f ; \
  esac \
done
